title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a function-oriented routing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose function declarations, expressions, arrows, and methods from hoisting, this, construction, and readability needs.
Use defaults, rest parameters, destructuring, and validation without hiding required inputs.
Separate returned values, mutations, I/O, and thrown failures into an understandable callable contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.javascript:
// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
// Add one runnable behavior, assertion, changed case, and evidence return per activity.
